notes: Hibernation API (acceptWebSocket + webSocketMessage/Close/Error), SQLite-backed atomic counter via INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE, setAlarm() debounced idle cleanup, and a schemaReady flag reset before deleteAll() so the table is rebuilt on immediate reconnect.
experiment: This run is the WITH-gotchas arm of an A/B test (with vs without the documented gotchas). See the secret gist report linked in README.md.
